output.final_answer:
Here are the top 3 laptops found on Flipkart under ₹80,000:

1. HP 15 with MSO'2024 AMD Ryzen 3 Quad Core 7320U
   - Price: ₹46,700
   - Processor: AMD Ryzen 3 Quad Core
   - RAM: 8 GB
   - Screen Size: 39.62 cm (15.6 Inch)

2. HP 15 (i3 14th Gen) Intel Core 3 100U
   - Price: ₹41,838
   - Processor: Intel Core 3
   - RAM: 8 GB
   - Screen Size: 39.62 cm (15.6 Inch)

3. ASUS Vivobook 15 (2026)
   - Price: ₹58,990
   - Processor: AMD Ryzen 5 Hexa Core 150
   - RAM: 16 GB
   - Screen Size: 39.62 cm (15.6 Inch)

prompt_sent:
You are the Formatter skill. You are the conventional TERMINAL node of
every DAG. Your job is to produce the final user-facing answer from
whatever upstream nodes have provided.

You make no tool calls. The user's original query appears under
USER_QUERY. Upstream results appear under INPUTS.

Procedure:
  1. Read USER_QUERY.
  2. Read INPUTS and decide which fields / findings answer the query.
  3. Write the user-facing answer in plain English. Adapt the format
     (numbered list, comparison table, one paragraph) to what the
     question actually asked.

Output schema (JSON, no prose, no markdown fences):

  {
    "final_answer": "<the answer the user sees>"
  }

Rules:
  - This is the LAST node. Do not add successors.
  - The answer must be answerable from INPUTS alone. If an upstream
    node returned `(not found)` or marked itself failed, say so plainly
    to the user rather than inventing.
  - Cite sources only when an upstream node included them (Researcher
    nodes do; Retriever nodes do). Do not invent URLs.

USER_QUERY: Open the
  Flipkart homepage at https://www.flipkart.com, use the search box to search 
  for laptops, filter by price under 80000, sort the list, and give the top 3 
  laptops with model name, price, processor, RAM, and screen size.

MEMORY HITS (4 from FAISS):
  - [scratchpad] Search for laptops on Flipkart with price under 80000 and extract top 3 details
      source: user_query
      raw: Open the
  Flipkart homepage at https://www.flipkart.com and use the search box to 
  search for laptops, then filter the results by price under 80000, then sort 
  the list, and give the top 3 laptops with model name, price, processor, RAM, 
  and screen size.
  - [scratchpad] Comparison of top 3 laptops under 80000 INR on Flipkart
      source: user_query
      raw: Compare
  the top 3 laptops under 80000 INR on Flipkart, give model name, price,
  processor, RAM, screen size.
  - [scratchpad] Search for laptops on Flipkart under 80000 and list top 3 results
      source: user_query
      raw: Open the
  Flipkart homepage at https://www.flipkart.com, use the search box to search
  for laptops, filter by price under 80000, sort the list, and give the top 3
  laptops with model name, price, processor, and RAM.
  - [scratchpad] Automated search and data extraction for laptops under 80000 on Flipkart
      source: user_query
      raw: Open the
  Flipkart homepage at https://www.flipkart.com, use the search box to search 
  for laptops, filter by price under 80000, sort the list, and give the top 3 
  laptops with model name, price, processor, RAM, and screen size.

INPUTS:
[
  {
    "id": "USER_QUERY",
    "kind": "query",
    "value": "Open the\n  Flipkart homepage at https://www.flipkart.com, use the search box to search \n  for laptops, filter by price under 80000, sort the list, and give the top 3 \n  laptops with model name, price, processor, RAM, and screen size."
  },
  {
    "id": "n:3",
    "kind": "upstream",
    "skill": "distiller",
    "output": {
      "fields": {
        "top_laptops": [
          {
            "model": "HP 15 with MSO'2024 AMD Ryzen 3 Quad Core 7320U",
            "price": "\u20b946,700",
            "processor": "AMD Ryzen 3 Quad Core",
            "ram": "8 GB",
            "screen_size": "39.62 cm (15.6 Inch)"
          },
          {
            "model": "HP 15 (i3 14th Gen) Intel Core 3 100U",
            "price": "\u20b941,838",
            "processor": "Intel Core 3",
            "ram": "8 GB",
            "screen_size": "39.62 cm (15.6 Inch)"
          },
          {
            "model": "ASUS Vivobook 15 (2026)",
            "price": "\u20b958,990",
            "processor": "AMD Ryzen 5 Hexa Core 150",
            "ram": "16 GB",
            "screen_size": "39.62 cm (15.6 Inch)"
          }
        ]
      },
      "rationale": "The top 3 laptop details were extracted directly from the browser node's final output."
    }
  }
]
